allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; print\('ASGI app OK:', app.title, app.version\); print\('routes:', sorted\(r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,'path'\)\)\)")

Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: DB engine and /ready readiness probe *)
